# J. James Painting Contractors

> Family-run painting business on the Sunshine Coast, Queensland.
> Established 1985 (formerly Hume and Staff Painters). QBCC licensed.
> Specialises in residential property transitions: pre-sale prep,
> rental between-tenancy, new-home purchase, boutique residential.

## Priority services

- [Boutique house painting](https://jjamespaintingcontractorsqld.com.au/services/boutique-house-painting): Architectural, heritage, and coastal premium homes across Noosa, Sunshine Beach, Maleny, Buderim hinterland.
- [House pre-sale painting](https://jjamespaintingcontractorsqld.com.au/services/house-pre-sale-painting): Fast-turn vendor repaints. Neutral palettes, agent coordination, photo-ready in days.
- [Rental property repaint](https://jjamespaintingcontractorsqld.com.au/services/rental-property-repaint): Between-tenancy turnovers. Durable finishes, PM coordination, multi-property packages.
- [New home painting](https://jjamespaintingcontractorsqld.com.au/services/new-home-purchase-painting): Empty-house painting between settlement and move-in. Colour consultation included.

## Projects

- [Projects index](https://jjamespaintingcontractorsqld.com.au/projects): Recent painting work across pre-sale, rental, new-home, and boutique residential.

## About

- [About J. James](https://jjamespaintingcontractorsqld.com.au/about): Family-business founding story (1985 to today), team, qualifications, insurance, brand partners. Owner: Jamie James.

## Contact

- [Get a free quote](https://jjamespaintingcontractorsqld.com.au/contact): Quote form with conditional fields per service type. Reply within one business day. Phone 0403 571 616.

## Service area

Sunshine Coast region: Buderim, Maleny, Forest Glen, Sippy Downs, Caloundra, Sunshine Beach, Noosa, Peregian, Coolum, Glasshouse Mountains, Aura, Kawana.

## Suburb hubs

- [Locations index](https://jjamespaintingcontractorsqld.com.au/locations): All twelve Sunshine Coast suburbs we paint.
- [Painters in Buderim](https://jjamespaintingcontractorsqld.com.au/locations/buderim): 1980s-90s brick-veneer family stock plus newer architectural builds. Rental and vendor work dominates.
- [Painters in Caloundra](https://jjamespaintingcontractorsqld.com.au/locations/caloundra): Beach cottages through to newer subdivisions, pre-sale-heavy market.
- [Painters in Coolum](https://jjamespaintingcontractorsqld.com.au/locations/coolum): Coastal fibro-and-timber plus newer Hardie builds, holiday-let turnovers.
- [Painters in Forest Glen](https://jjamespaintingcontractorsqld.com.au/locations/forest-glen): Newer family stock between Buderim and the hinterland.
- [Painters around the Glasshouse Mountains](https://jjamespaintingcontractorsqld.com.au/locations/glasshouse-mountains): Semi-rural acreage, weatherboard farmhouses, hinterland boutique.
- [Painters in Kawana](https://jjamespaintingcontractorsqld.com.au/locations/kawana): Canal-front exteriors plus inland family stock.
- [Painters in Maleny](https://jjamespaintingcontractorsqld.com.au/locations/maleny): Heritage Queenslanders and hinterland weatherboards, lead-paint qualified prep.
- [Painters in Noosa](https://jjamespaintingcontractorsqld.com.au/locations/noosa): Architectural coastal premium, vendor refreshes, rental network.
- [Painters in Peregian](https://jjamespaintingcontractorsqld.com.au/locations/peregian): Peregian Beach surf village and Peregian Springs estates.
- [Painters in Sippy Downs](https://jjamespaintingcontractorsqld.com.au/locations/sippy-downs): University precinct, rental-heavy stock, between-tenancy specialists.
- [Painters in Sunshine Beach](https://jjamespaintingcontractorsqld.com.au/locations/sunshine-beach): One of the Coast's most demanding paint environments. Architectural coastal premium.
- [Painters in Aura](https://jjamespaintingcontractorsqld.com.au/locations/aura): Coast's biggest new-build estate. Settlement-to-move-in repaints.

## Key facts

- Established 1985 (formerly Hume and Staff Painters).
- QBCC licensed.
- Lead-based paint and asbestos removal qualified.
- Dulux Accredited Painter and Taubmans Endorsed (accreditation badges pending verification).
- Family-run; locally owned.
- Phone: 0403 571 616.
- Hours: Mon–Fri 7:00–17:00, Sat 8:00–13:00.
